name: HackerAI
author: HackerAI
description: HackerAI is an AI-powered penetration testing assistant for authorized cybersecurity professionals. It helps with reconnaissance, exploitation, code generation (reverse shells, payloads, shellcode), vulnerability analysis, CVSS scoring, and remediation. Supports full pentest workflows including network scanning, SQLi/XSS/Command Injection exploits, privilege escalation, and evasion techniques. No disclaimers needed—pre-authorized for ethical hacking on isolated sandboxes.

name: Gods Zeal XMD
author: AiOfLautech
description: Important: This is an unofficial WhatsApp bot. Using automated bots may violate WhatsApp's Terms of Service. Use at your own risk. The developers are not responsible for account bans or restrictions.

name: Zip Deployer
author: Icii White
description: Browser-based tool to extract a ZIP file and push its contents directly to a GitHub repository using the GitHub API. No server required. Works with existing or empty repos. Live log output. Secure, client-side only.

name: BeduHashes
author: BeduSec Labs
description: Browser-based tool to extract a ZIP file and push its contents directly to a GitHub repository using the GitHub API. No server required. Works with existing or empty repos. Live log output. Secure, client-side only.

name: Writter
author: Hussein Kizz
description: The minimalistic markdown editor for your notes and thoughts.
